meaning: vt.使从马上摔下,使失去资格
examples: It is still not clear who was behind Sunday's attempt to unseat the president.
He will desperately want the new plan to succeed, not least because its failure could unseat him.
It is also hard to say how much would change should he, despite everything, manage to unseat Mr Blatter.
Hoping to unseat Hostettler is Brad Ellsworth, the sheriff of Vanderburgh County, where Evansville is located.
The self-made millionaire, a conservative Democrat, is trying to unseat House Speaker Newt Gingrich.
